name: Skibronx Runner
description: Welcome to Skibronx Runner! Here you make your way through the streets in this endless runner game while you encounter various challenges. In the level mode its your goal to reach the grocery store without losing. In the endless mode your goal is to reach as far as possible without losing.
instructions: Up Arrow Key jump 2x Up Arrow Key double jump Holding Up Arrow Key after double jump fly Arrow down Sliding E shoot watergun or bumping
tags: 1 Player, 2D, Action, Adventure, amazing, Arcade, Avoid, Best, Boys, Classic, Enemies, Jumping, running
